title: T-106 — Machine List screen (SET-016 §12.2)
prompt:
# T-106 — Machine List screen (SET-016 §12.2)

PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §12.2 (Infrastructure CRUD UI table)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build Machine List screen from §12.2 — status indicator + location breadcrumb per row, filter by status / warehouse, bulk activate/deactivate. Pulls from `machines` joined to `locations` via ltree to render breadcrumb (Warehouse > Zone > Rack > Bin).

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/machines/page.tsx is a Server Component fetching `machines` joined to `locations` (with ltree path → label crumb).
2. List columns: name, code, status indicator (online/offline/maintenance from machines.specs.status), location breadcrumb, deactivated_at badge.
3. Toolbar: status filter, warehouse filter, bulk-select + bulk activate/deactivate calling T-029 server actions.
4. Each row has Edit link routing to /settings/infra/machines/[id] (out of scope here — SET-017 Machine Edit is a separate screen).
5. RBAC: requires `settings.infra.read` for view, `settings.infra.update` for bulk actions.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/machines/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/machines/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test mounting list with mocked machines + locations seed; assert breadcrumb render, status filter, bulk action wiring.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/machines/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + bulk action.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).
- Do not query without withOrgContext (RLS).
- Do not implement Edit modal (separate SET-017 screen).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: Machine List screen (SET-016): status indicator + location breadcrumb + filters + bulk activate/deactivate.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §12.2 SET-016: Machine List with `status indicator, location breadcrumb` capability. Status comes from `machines.specs.status` JSONB field per §5.6 + §12.1. Breadcrumb derived from joined `locations.path` ltree; helper `pathToBreadcrumb(path)` maps each path segment to a labeled crumb.
out_of_scope: SET-017 Machine Edit form (specs JSONB editor) — separate screen
acceptance_criteria: Given the machines list renders, when 5 machines exist across 2 warehouses, then each row shows a status indicator and a 4-segment breadcrumb derived from the location ltree path.
Given the user toggles the status filter to `maintenance`, when the list re-renders, then only rows with `specs.status='maintenance'` are visible.
Given the user bulk-selects 3 machines and clicks Bulk Deactivate, when action runs, then T-029 deactivateMachine is invoked once per row and the rows reflect new deactivated_at.
Given the caller lacks `settings.infra.update`, when they view the list, then bulk action buttons are disabled with an aria-label explaining insufficient permissions.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test mounts list with mocked seed (machines + locations); asserts breadcrumb render, status filter, bulk-action invocation, RBAC disable.
GREEN: implement Server Component + breadcrumb helper + filters + bulk wiring.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement Edit modal (separate SET-017 screen).
